data.description:
## What
Port get-file-impact + get-verify-commands (sibling field reads) to in-process Python.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Both dispatch in-process via rebar._cli (_FIELD_READS set, full auto-init)
- [ ] Library get_file_impact/get_verify_commands rewired off _run to in-process
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash (success/miss/arity/empty; both --output modes)
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned second impl until E7/E8)
data.title: E2.1: port get-file-impact + get-verify-commands in-process
